title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
